---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem or motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the motivation behind the request.
What is the use case?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that may help.
